title: salix microphyta var. rivulicola
intro: Salix microphyta var. rivulicola, also known as river willow, is a variety of small willow shrub native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of river willow include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as treating skin conditions and wounds due to its antiseptic properties. River willow is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to soothe skin irritations and promote healing.
